name: OWASP LLM08 - Cross Tenant Data Leakage

nodes.name: When clicking ‘Execute workflow’
nodes.notes: Triggers the document ingestion pipeline to create the shared tenant collection and store documents from both Company A and Company B.

nodes.name: When chat message received
nodes.notes: Receives user queries from the chat interface. Messages should include 'no-isolation' for unfiltered queries or 'isolated company_a/company_b' for tenant-filtered queries.

options.systemMessage:
Agent System Message:
You are a helpful assistant that searches company documents. Follow these rules strictly:


2. TENANT ISOLATION DETECTION :
- Message contains 'no-isolation': use the shared tenant tool. Do not pass any tenant filter. Pass "tenant" as "null"
- Only if Message contains 'isolated': use the shared tenant tool. Extract the tenant from the message pass the "tenant" as "company_a" or "company_b"(e.g., 'company_a' or 'company_b') and if we have "isolated" specified and If no tenant is specified, do not call the tool and stop the print the message - "TENANT NOT SPECIFIED".

3. Strip all prefixes and keywords ('no-isolation', 'isolated') from the query before passing it to the tool.

4. Present the results clearly, stating which collection and tool returned which data.

nodes.name: AI Agent
nodes.notes: Routes the query to the tenant sub-workflow. Detects whether the message contains 'no-isolation' or 'isolated' and passes the tenant parameter accordingly. Passes 'null' for no filtering or the tenant name for isolation.

nodes.name: OpenAI Chat Model
nodes.notes: OpenAI model powering the AI Agent's reasoning, tool selection, and response generation.

nodes.name: Create Tenant Collection
nodes.notes: Creates the shared_tenant_db collection in ChromaDB. A single shared collection simulating a multi-tenant environment where multiple companies store data together.

nodes.name: Prepare Documents
nodes.notes: Prepares 6 documents, 3 from Company A and 3 from Company B — covering leave policy, remote work policy, and salary bands. Each document is tagged with tenant metadata (company_a or company_b).

nodes.name: Embed Documents
nodes.notes: Converts all 6 documents into vector embeddings using OpenAI's text-embedding-3-small model for storage in the shared collection.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ "ids": $('Prepare Documents').all().map((_, i) => "doc_" + i), "documents": $('Prepare Documents').all().map(item => item.json.pageContent), "embeddings": $('Embed Documents').all().map(item => item.json.data[0].embedding), "metadatas": $('Prepare Documents').all().map(item => item.json.metadata) }) }}

nodes.name: Add Embeddings to Collections
nodes.notes: Stores document text, embeddings, and tenant metadata into the shared_tenant_db collection. The tenant metadata enables filtering during retrieval.

parameters.description: Search the shared multi-tenant database tool.

nodes.name: Sub Workflow - Tenant
nodes.notes: Calls the tenant sub-workflow to query the shared collection. Passes the query and tenant parameters. The sub-workflow applies or skips tenant filtering based on the tenant value.

nodes.name: Delete Tenant Collection
nodes.notes: Utility node to delete the shared_tenant_db collection from ChromaDB. Run manually for cleanup or reset.

parameters.content:
LLM08: Cross-Tenant Data Leakage

This workflow demonstrates how sharing a single vector database across multiple tenants without proper isolation leads to cross-context information leaks. Documents from Company A and Company B are stored in the same ChromaDB collection with tenant metadata. When queried without tenant filtering ('no-isolation'), data from both tenants is returned, exposing one company's confidential policies to another. When queried with tenant filtering ('isolated'), only the specified tenant's documents are returned.

## Prompts

Scenario 1: No Tenant Isolation (Cross-Context Leakage)

no-isolation: What is the annual leave policy?
no-isolation: What is the remote work policy?
no-isolation: What are the salary bands for engineers?

Scenario 2: With Tenant Isolation (Mitigated)

isolated company_a: What is the annual leave policy?
isolated company_a: What is the remote work policy?
isolated company_b: What are the salary bands for engineers?
isolated company_b: What is the annual leave policy?

Compare: Without isolation, the agent returns conflicting policies from both companies. With isolation, only the specified tenant's data is returned, no cross-tenant leakage.
